{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/30373481?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/berkdedekarginoglu/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/berkdedekarginoglu/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/berkdedekarginoglu/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/berkdedekarginoglu/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/berkdedekarginoglu", "id": 30373481, "login": "berkdedekarginoglu", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjMwMzczNDgx", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/berkdedekarginoglu/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/berkdedekarginoglu/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/berkdedekarginoglu/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/berkdedekarginoglu/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/berkdedekarginoglu/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/berkdedekarginoglu", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-46441", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 7.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-284", "name": "Improper Access Control"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-639", "name": "Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-915", "name": "Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes"}], "description": "### Summary
A Mass Assignment vulnerability exists in the assistant update endpoint of FlowiseAI.

The endpoint allows authenticated users to modify server-controlled properties such as workspaceId, createdDate, and updatedDate when updating an assistant resource.

Due to missing server-side validation and authorization checks, an attacker can manipulate the workspaceId field and reassign assistants to arbitrary workspaces. This breaks tenant isolation in multi-workspace environments.

### Details
The endpoint responsible for updating assistants:

**PUT /api/v1/assistants/{assistantId}**

accepts a JSON request body containing assistant metadata.

However, the server does not restrict which properties may be modified by the client. As a result, user-controlled request bodies can include additional fields that should normally be controlled only by the backend.

Server-controlled fields that can be manipulated include:

1. workspaceId
2. createdDate
3. updatedDate

These fields appear to be directly mapped to the underlying database entity without strict DTO whitelisting or authorization checks.

For example, the following request body was accepted:

```json
{
  "details": "",
  "credential": "11ca7fef-c9b1-4c87-aa54-e547aed8a249",
  "iconSrc": null,
  "type": "CUSTOM",
  "createdDate": "2026-03-06T17:31:04.000Z",
  "updatedDate": "2026-03-06T17:31:55.000Z",
  "workspaceId": "11111111-2222-3333-4444-555555555555"
}
```

This indicates that internal, server-controlled properties can be modified by an authenticated user.

### PoC

1. Authenticate to the Flowise interface.
2. Capture the request used to update an assistant:

```http
PUT /api/v1/assistants/<ASSISTANT_ID>
Content-Type: application/json

Modify the request body by injecting server-controlled fields:

{
  "details": "",
  "credential": "11ca7fef-c9b1-4c87-aa54-e547aed8a249",
  "iconSrc": null,
  "type": "CUSTOM",
  "createdDate": "2026-03-06T17:31:04.000Z",
  "updatedDate": "2026-03-06T17:31:55.000Z",
  "workspaceId": "11111111-2222-3333-4444-555555555555"
}

```
3.Send the request.

Observe that the response accepts and persists the attacker-controlled workspaceId and metadata fields.

### Impact
This vulnerability allows authenticated users to manipulate internal attributes of assistant resources.

Confirmed impacts include:

- Cross-workspace reassignment of assistants (workspaceId)
- Unauthorized modification of metadata (createdDate, updatedDate)

In multi-tenant deployments, this may allow an attacker to move assistants between workspaces without authorization, breaking tenant isolation boundaries.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00274, "percentile": 0.18919}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-hp26-q66v-q2w7", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-14T14:57:46Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hp26-q66v-q2w7", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-hp26-q66v-q2w7"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-46441"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-08T16:16:41Z", "published_at": "2026-05-14T14:57:46Z", "references": ["https://github.com/FlowiseAI/Flowise/security/advisories/GHSA-hp26-q66v-q2w7", "https://github.com/FlowiseAI/Flowise/releases/tag/flowise%403.1.2", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-46441", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hp26-q66v-q2w7"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/FlowiseAI/Flowise/security-advisories/GHSA-hp26-q66v-q2w7", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/FlowiseAI/Flowise", "summary": "FlowiseAI has Mass Assignment in Assistant Update Endpoint that Allows Cross-Workspace Resource Reassignment", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T13:10:14Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-hp26-q66v-q2w7", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.1.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "flowise"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 3.1.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: FlowiseAI has Mass Assignment in Assistant Update Endpoint that Allows Cross-Workspace Resource Reassignment
